description: Legacy token names that cannot be deterministically generated from a structured name object. Each entry tracks a known inconsistency for future remediation.

compound-state.description: Tokens with multiple simultaneous states (e.g., selected + hover) that cannot be represented in the single state field

state-position.description: Tokens where state appears in a non-standard position (e.g., disabled-background-color instead of background-color-disabled)

typography-script.description: Typography tokens with writing system qualifiers (cjk) — needs typography taxonomy

typography-family.description: Typography tokens with font family qualifiers (sans-serif, serif) — needs typography taxonomy

typography-weight.description: Typography tokens with weight/emphasis qualifiers (emphasized, strong, heavy) — needs taxonomy classification

drop-shadow-property.description: Drop-shadow sub-properties (blur, x, y) — needs classification of drop-shadow as structure/object/property

spacing-between.description: Spacing-between (-to-) pattern tokens — no representation in 13-field spec (571 deprecated, 20 active)

context-modifier.description: Context/layer modifiers (elevated, pasteboard, ambient) — no field for UI layering context

spatial-qualifier.description: Spatial sub-part qualifiers (inner, outer) — could expand positions registry
